_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: However, the IC 50 values of nilotinib were 4.0 and 4.7 µM, much lower than the 12.4 and 14.6 µM of imatinib.
details: Nilotinib IC50 values were 4.0 µM (proliferation) and 4.7 µM (viability), much lower than imatinib's 12.4 µM and 14.6 µM respectively
